sizing_rule.note: Base position size of 1.5% per trade; apply 2.0× multiplier to highest-ranked reward-to-risk trades (minimum RR ratio 2.0); results in max 3% on top conviction trades within diversified portfolio framework

source_rule_text: Allocate larger position sizes to opportunities with the highest probability-weighted reward-to-risk ratio, concentrating capital in the highest-conviction trades within a diversified portfolio.
